name: Microsurgical Varicocele Correction
description: Microsurgical repair of enlarged veins in the scrotum to improve fertility and reduce discomfort.
preOperativeInstructions: Fast for 6 hours. Arrange transport home as you cannot drive after anaesthetic.
postOperativeInstructions: Rest for 48 hours. Wear supportive underwear. Avoid heavy lifting and strenuous activity for 2 weeks, and avoid sexual activity during this period.
expectedOutcomes: Reduced scrotal discomfort. Fertility-related improvements may take 3-6 months and vary between individuals.

uiCustomization.welcomeBody: This procedure has excellent success rates for improving fertility.

commonConcerns.concern: When can I return to work?
commonConcerns.response: Most patients return to desk work after 3-5 days. Physical work may require 2 weeks.
Some men see improved sperm parameters after surgery, but results vary and can take several months.
